summary: Markets show risk-on sentiment with Bitcoin holding strong above $80K amid short liquidations, gold surging to $4,724 on a weaker dollar, and tech stocks like semis leading gains post-Micron earnings. Crypto futures saw $91M in mostly short liquidations for BTC, ETH, and TON, signaling bullish rejection of downside. Commodities outperform with oil mixed but crude at elevated levels.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Expects Bitcoin and altcoins to pop this weekend with potential upside breakout.

signals.name: Altcoins
signals.reason: Questions if altcoin season is finally happening and shares personal altcoin trades.

signals.name: Micron
